description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a metallic gold and black finish. The body is primarily gold with intricate engravings, while the magazine, grip, and stock are black, providing a striking contrast. The rifle features a short barrel and a detachable box magazine, with a prominent pistol grip and a collapsible or folding stock. The top of the receiver appears to have a simple iron sight, and the overall design is sleek and tactical, suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The materials suggest a combination of metal for the main body and polymer for the grip and stock. The rifle's compact size and ornate finish make it both functional and visually distinctive.
description: A compact, gold and black submachine gun-style rifle with a short barrel, detachable magazine, and collapsible stock, featuring ornate engravings and a tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold receiver, black grip, magazine, and the detailed engravings on the stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, muzzle, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the gold body, black magazine, and the other side of the collapsible stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the alignment of the magazine and grip.
